en: "If there is a dispute between men and they come into court and the judges decide between them, acquitting the innocent and condemning the guilty,
zh: “如果人與人之間有爭訟的事，就上法庭去；審判官審判他們的時候，要定義人有理，定惡人有罪；

en: then if the guilty man deserves to be beaten, the judge shall cause him to lie down and be beaten in his presence with a number of stripes in proportion to his offense.
zh: 如果有罪的人應受責打，審判官就要叫他伏下，當面按著他的罪，照著數目責打他。

en: Forty stripes may be given him, but not more, lest, if one should go on to beat him with more stripes than these, your brother be degraded in your sight.
zh: 只可打他四十下，不可再多；恐怕你多打了他，過了這數目，你的兄弟就在你眼前受辱了。

en: "You shall not muzzle an ox when it is treading out the grain.
zh: “牛在踹穀的時候，不可籠住牠的嘴。

en: "If brothers dwell together, and one of them dies and has no son, the wife of the dead man shall not be married outside the family to a stranger. Her husband's brother shall go in to her and take her as his wife and perform the duty of a husband's brother to her.
zh: “兄弟住在一起，他們中間如果有一個死了，沒有留下兒子，死者的妻子就不可出嫁外人；她丈夫的兄弟要向她盡兄弟的本分，娶她為妻，和她同房。

en: And the first son whom she bears shall succeed to the name of his dead brother, that his name may not be blotted out of Israel.
zh: 她所生的長子要歸亡兄的名下，免得他的名字從以色列中被塗抹了。

en: And if the man does not wish to take his brother's wife, then his brother's wife shall go up to the gate to the elders and say, 'My husband's brother refuses to perpetuate his brother's name in Israel; he will not perform the duty of a husband's brother to me.'
zh: 那人如果不喜歡娶他兄弟的妻子，他兄弟的妻子就要到城門去見長老，說：‘我丈夫的兄弟不肯在以色列中為自己的哥哥立名，不肯對我盡兄弟的本分。’

en: Then the elders of his city shall call him and speak to him, and if he persists, saying, 'I do not wish to take her,'
zh: 本城的長老就要把那人叫來，對他說明；如果他堅持說：‘我不樂意娶她’，

en: then his brother's wife shall go up to him in the presence of the elders and pull his sandal off his foot and spit in his face. And she shall answer and say, 'So shall it be done to the man who does not build up his brother's house.'
zh: 他哥哥的妻子就要當著長老的面前，走到那人跟前，脫去他腳上的鞋子，吐唾沫在他的臉上，說：‘那不為自己哥哥建立家室的，人人都要這樣對待他。’

en: And the name of his house shall be called in Israel, 'The house of him who had his sandal pulled off.'
zh: 從此，在以色列中他的名字 必稱為‘脫鞋者之家’。

en: "When men fight with one another and the wife of the one draws near to rescue her husband from the hand of him who is beating him and puts out her hand and seizes him by the private parts,
zh: “有兩個人在一起打鬥，如果其中一人的妻子走前來，要救她的丈夫脫離那打她丈夫的人的手，就伸手抓住那人的下體，

en: then you shall cut off her hand. Your eye shall have no pity.
zh: 你就要砍掉那婦人的手；你的眼不可顧惜。

en: "You shall not have in your bag two kinds of weights, a large and a small.
zh: “你袋裡不可有兩樣不同的法碼，一大一小；

en: You shall not have in your house two kinds of measures, a large and a small.
zh: 你家裡不可有兩樣不同的升斗，一大一小。

en: A full and fair weight you shall have, a full and fair measure you shall have, that your days may be long in the land that the LORD your God is giving you.
zh: 你要有準確公正的法碼，你要有準確公正的升斗，好使你在耶和華你的 神賜給你的地上，得享長壽。

en: For all who do such things, all who act dishonestly, are an abomination to the LORD your God.
zh: 因為所有行這些事的，就是行不義的事的，都是耶和華你的 神厭惡的。

en: "Remember what Amalek did to you on the way as you came out of Egypt,
zh: “你要記住你們出了埃及以後，亞瑪力人在路上怎樣對待你；

en: how he attacked you on the way when you were faint and weary, and cut off your tail, those who were lagging behind you, and he did not fear God.
zh: 怎樣在路上遇見了你，趁你疲倦困乏的時候，攻擊你後方所有軟弱無力的人，並不敬畏 神。

en: Therefore when the LORD your God has given you rest from all your enemies around you, in the land that the LORD your God is giving you for an inheritance to possess, you shall blot out the memory of Amalek from under heaven; you shall not forget.
zh: 所以耶和華你的 神使你脫離四圍所有的仇敵，在耶和華你的 神賜給你作產業的地上，得享太平的時候，你務要把亞瑪力這名號從天下塗抹，不可忘記。”
